title: HyperPBI SVG Operations Experience — Professional Animated (Budget Safe v3)

components.title: Digital operations overview
components.ariaLabel: Executive operations overview with live metrics and animated equipment summary
components.description: Professional summary banner using data-bound KPIs and meaningful motion.

components.title: Animated operations chain
components.ariaLabel: Structured station chain with live status and meaningful equipment animation
components.description: Stations are rendered as operational cards on a connected process chain.

elements.text: Click the circular icon on any station card to inspect that record.
Only the circular icon is interactive, so selection focus stays compact and the card no longer gets the ugly full-box outline.

components.title: Selected operational record
components.subtitle: Select a station icon, asset icon, stage icon, or a table row.
components.emptyText: No record selected yet. Use the compact circular selectors in the SVG visuals.

components.title: Program stage flow
components.ariaLabel: Animated program stage flow with interactive stage selectors
components.description: Stage icons remain compactly interactive and the progress bars stay data-driven.

components.title: Animated asset condition board
components.ariaLabel: Professional animated asset cards with compact selectors
components.description: Asset cards use equipment-specific icons and subtle motion without hover jitter.

components.title: Operational records
components.subtitle: Bottom-line asset list. Use search or select a row.
